:root{--color-white:#fff;--color-accent:#dc56c5;--color-bg:#212121}*{padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;outline:none}*,body{margin:0}body{font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;font-weight:400;background-image:url(5acf5c5f3da74ab51a9dbebc720daff5.png);background-position:top;background-repeat:no-repeat;color:var(--color-white);background-color:#0e0e0e;min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.container{width:100%;max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 10px}.header__container{position:relative}.header__logo{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:239px;height:201px;border-radius:0 0 100% 0;backdrop-filter:blur(22px);box-shadow:inset 7px 7px 16px hsla(0,0%,100%,.3)}.header__logo img{margin:40px 0 0 40px}.header__content{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-bottom:170px}.header__title{padding:40px 0 52px;text-align:center;font-size:50px;font-weight:900;color:var(--color-accent)}.header__search{display:flex;flex-direction:row;align-items:center;gap:30px}.header__search input{padding:10px 50px 10px 30px;width:270px;height:40px;border-radius:20px;font-size:16px;border:none}.header__country,.header__keyword{position:relative}.header__input{width:270px;height:40px;border-radius:20px;border:none;background:hsla(0,0%,100%,.15);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);color:#fff;font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;font-size:16px}.header__input::placeholder{color:#939393}.header__btn{position:absolute;right:30px;top:13px;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer}.header__country{display:flex}.country-dropdown{display:none;position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 6px);left:0;right:0;border-radius:12px;backdrop-filter:blur(20px);max-height:220px;overflow-y:auto;z-index:100}.country-dropdown.open{display:block}.dropdown-item{padding:10px 20px;font-size:14px;font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;color:var(--color-white);cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s,color .15s}.dropdown-item:hover{background:rgba(220,86,198,.16470588235294117);color:var(--color-accent)}.main{flex:1}.main__container{max-width:1000px}#message{text-align:center;font-size:18px;color:#ebebeb}.events-list{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:50px}.event{width:100%;max-width:196px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer}.event-img{width:100%;height:205px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:10px}.event h3{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;padding:10px 0 5px;color:var(--color-accent)}.event p{font-size:16px;color:#fff;padding:5px 0}.event p:last-child{font-size:14px;font-weight:800}.event-venues:before{content:"";display:inline-block;width:7px;height:10px;margin-right:5px;background-image:url(64ec1b79849827414981944c1fd9a54b.svg);background-repeat:no-repeat}.footer__text{text-align:center;font-size:16px;color:#939393;padding-top:80px;padding-bottom:19px}@media img{max-width:100px;max-height:50px;margin:30px 0 0
